calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Dec-08-2020 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-08-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stanley Frazier, via ZOOM, counsel for Kim Ridinger, Executor.

At the onset, the court queries counsel as to the status of a proper Notice of Hearing. Counsel reports that he filed an amended Notice of Hearing on May 13, 2021 which is confirmed by the clerk. The court then turns to the issue of payment to Executors' sons for work they performed, without prior court approval. Counsel reports that the decedent's residence had to be done quickly, and hiring the sons was the best option to do so.

After additional discussion, including advising counsel that Executor's statutory compensation will be reduced by $822.36 for the payment to his sons, the matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-05-2021 Continued To May-17-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-08-2021 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-11-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Staus On Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jan-11-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Staus On Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Dec-14-2020 Continued To Jan-11-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor Kim Ridinger and the Attorney Stanley Frazier to appear on January 11, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a final inventory and appraisal has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
